title: Handy Toolbox
body:
In this datapack you can:

📏 Use the Laser rangefinder if you want to know the distance between you and a block (Right-click button)

🎨 Use the Spray paint can if you want to paint any surface to replace blocks without having to break them first (Right-click button)

⛏️ Use the Spray paint can again to remove blocks, replacing them with air   
- You can filter the blocks to be replaced
- Grasses and plants are not considered 'solid' blocks by this datapack   
- Changes to block IDs must be made with a code/text editor (Notepad++, Sublime Text, ...) in the datapack folder:
 

```
.minecraft\saves\<yourmap>\datapacks\Handy Toolbox\data\tools\function\collisions\block\wall\brush
```

⚠️​The resource pack is required for the skins on these new tools to be applied


**Give commands:**


- Laser rangefinder

```
/function give:laser_rangefinder
```

- Spray paint can

```
/function give:spray_paint_can
```


Consider that this data pack is open to improvement. I'm open to suggestions on adding new features.

All rights reserved


**How to install Data pack:**

https://minecraft.wiki/w/Data_pack

https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorials/Installing_a_data_pack

**How to install Resource pack:**

[https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorials/Loading_a_resource_pack](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorials/Loading_a_resource_pack)
